description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a prominent gable roof and a modest, rectangular footprint. The front facade features a covered porch area, a main entrance, and a large window, with a driveway leading to a side carport. The property is enclosed by a low boundary wall and includes landscaping elements such as trees and shrubs, primarily concentrated on one side. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, with contrasting darker accents around the porch and entryway. Multiple windows of varying sizes are distributed asymmetrically along the sides and rear, providing ample natural light. The roofline is simple, with a central chimney and minimal decorative elements, reflecting a practical and understated architectural style.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, covered porch, and asymmetrical window arrangement, surrounded by a low wall and landscaping. The exterior is light-colored with dark accents and features a driveway with a carport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, large front window, driveway, carport, and landscaping on the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side windows, chimney, and dense landscaping near the boundary wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a long stretch of wall with several windows and the carport visible on the left.
description_view_3: Right side view with grouped windows, chimney, and dense landscaping at the rear corner.
